items.title: Marjane Satrapi, the Author of ‘Persepolis,’ Dies at 56
items.summary: Her popular graphic novel series, published in the early 2000s, followed an Iranian girl through the Islamic Revolution and the Iran-Iraq War.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Defence Minister unveils revised financial powers for armed forces to boost operational autonomy
items.summary: Financial powers have been enhanced by up to 100%; the move is expected to empower field commanders with greater decision-making authority
